notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Joey Wiemer. Brandon Marsh scores. J.T. Realmuto to 2nd.
